recoveryPolicy.name: Stamina Recovery Policy
recoveryPolicy.hint: When characters recover stamina during rests.

staminaMaxFormula.name: Default Stamina Max Formula
staminaMaxFormula.hint: Used when initialising a character's stamina pool. Formula uses the character's roll data (e.g. '3 + @abilities.con.mod').

confirmStamina.name: Confirm Stamina Spend
confirmStamina.hint: Show a confirmation dialog before spending stamina on a technique.

showCardsTab.name: Show Cards Tab
showCardsTab.hint: Show the Cards tab on character sheets. Disabling hides the tab without removing any data.

sheet.treatAsCardLabel: Treat this item as an Oknajan card.

spell.componentsHint: Tick components that remain essential at tier 1. Unticked components are treated as mastered and displayed struck-through on the card.
spell.empowermentHint: Describes what one empowerment does. The first empowerment is free at tier 2; each additional empowerment costs one extra spell slot of the cast level.

technique.staminaCostHint: Drives the activity's stamina consumption target. Edits sync automatically when you change activation to/from Passive.
technique.passiveHint: This technique has no activation, so it spends no stamina.

warn.noActivityForTechnique: This technique has no activity, so its stamina cost cannot be wired into the activity's consumption targets. Add an activity on the Activities tab.

initStamina.title: Initialise stamina pool
initStamina.overwrite: This character already has a stamina pool configured on the tertiary resource. Re-initialising will overwrite its label, max, current value, and rest flags. Continue?

empowerment.title: Empowerment
empowerment.hint: The first empowerment is free; each additional empowerment consumes one extra spell slot of the cast level.
